chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-326 of 2021 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. For hearing of bail application. 16.09.2021 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik Advocate for complainant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, D.P.G for the State. *************** O R D E R Applicant Irshad Ahmed Awan present on interim bail. Through instant Crl. Bail application, applicant Irshad Ahmed son of Peer Bux Awan seeks pre-arrest bail in Crime No.21 of 2021 registered at Police Station, Jarwar under section 489-F, P.P.C. The applicant was admitted to interim pre-arrest bail by this Court subject to furnishing of solvent surety in the sum of Rs.500,000/- and PR bond in the like amount vide order, dated 03.06.2021, now he seeks confirmation of the same. Briefly stated facts of the case are that on 24.02.2021, complainant Niaz Ahmed lodged the aforementioned F.I.R. alleging therein that applicant/accused has borrowed some amount from complainant for which he issued a cheque dated 17.08.2020 of United Bank Ltd. Jing Exxon Chemical Pakistan Ltd. Daharki Branch, amounting to Rs.90,40,000/-, which was dishonored on its presentation. At the very outset, learned counsel for the complainant states that he has no objection for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail subject to raising the bail amount from Rs.500,000/- to Rs.10,00,000/- by the applicant. 2 Learned Counsel for applicant/accused while showing his willingness for furnishing additional surety of Rs.500,000/- requests for the grant of Two weeks time for furnishing additional surety. Accordingly, the interim bail granted to applicant vide order dated 03.06.2021 is hereby confirmed by consent subject to his furnishing additional surety of Rs. 500,000/- with fresh PR bond of Rs.10,00,000/- to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court within Two weeks hereof.

At the very outset, learned counsel for the complainant states that he has no objection for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail subject to raising the bail amount from Rs.500,000/- to Rs.10,00,000/- by the applicant. 2 Learned Counsel for applicant/accused while showing his willingness for furnishing additional surety of Rs.500,000/- requests for the grant of Two weeks time for furnishing additional surety. Accordingly, the interim bail granted to applicant vide order dated 03.06.2021 is hereby confirmed by consent subject to his furnishing additional surety of Rs. 500,000/- with fresh PR bond of Rs.10,00,000/- to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court within Two weeks hereof. However, in case applicant fails to furnish additional surety within stipulated period, this Crl. Bail Application shall stands dismissed by recalling interim order dated 03.06.2021. Application stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E Ihsan/*
